title: Indulgent Mediterranean Tofu Pasta
description: A creamy, caramelized tofu pasta packed with Mediterranean flavors, sugar‑kissed onions, and a gooey feta‑yogurt sauce—perfect for a post‑workout indulgence.
instructions: Cook pasta in salted boiling water according to package instructions until al dente; drain and set aside.
While pasta cooks, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add diced onion to the skillet and sauté until translucent, about 4 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and granulated sugar, cooking until the mixture caramelizes lightly, around 2 minutes.
Add cherry tomatoes to the skillet, cooking until they begin to soften, about 3 minutes.
Increase heat to medium‑high, add tofu cubes, and fry until golden on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to low, fold in spinach leaves, and cook until wilted, 1 minute.
Return the cooked pasta to the skillet, tossing everything together with the remaining tablespoon of olive oil.
Remove from heat, stir in crumbled feta, Greek yogurt, lemon juice, and oregano, mixing until creamy and gooey.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh herbs or extra feta.
